data.name: Path of Sorrow and Pleasure
data.detailed_description:
Adult Action RPG with Harem Building

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ✦ Story ✦ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Step into the boots of Roderick, a daring adventurer, and embark on a journey filled with challenges, both grim and heartwarming. As Roderick travels through a world threatened by a mysterious dark force, he encounters not only fierce enemies but also moments of kindness and joy. Along the way, he gains loyal allies, each bringing their own skills and stories, working together to stand against the looming darkness that threatens to engulf the world. Face perilous trials, make life-changing decisions, and form bonds that will be tested in the heat of battle. The fate of the world rests on Roderick and his companions as they fight to uncover the true nature of the evil they face. Can you lead Roderick and his allies to victory? The world’s future is in your hands.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚔ Features ⚔ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

◈ Action RPG Combat

Dynamic, skill-driven battles that keep you on your toes.

◈ Character Development

Grow Roderick and his companions through choices and experience.


◈ Story Choices

Branching decisions that shape the fate of the world around you.


◈ Animated  scenes

A variety of fully animated, mature scenes.


◈ Relationship System
Build deep bonds with your companions — every interaction matters.

◈ Reputation System
Your deeds echo across the land. Hero or villain — you decide.

◈ Character Development

◈ Relationship System
Build deep bonds with your companions — every interaction matters.

◈ Reputation System
Your deeds echo across the land. Hero or villain — you decide.
data.short_description: As Roderick, you'll embark on an epic quest to reclaim your lost memories while battling dark forces, expanding your harem of loyal companions, and uncovering mysteries hidden within your past—and much more awaits!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Win 10/11 64-Bit
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 5 3600X 6-Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: openSUSE Tumbleweed 20240924
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i7-3770 CPU @ 3.40GHz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon RX 550 / 550 Series
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Win 10/11 64-Bit
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 3600X 6-Core Processor
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650
  • Storage: 12 GB available space

Minimum:

  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i7-3770 CPU @ 3.40GHz
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon RX 550 / 550 Series
